title: selaginella parkeri var. pedata
intro: Selaginella parkeri var. pedata, also known as the Spikemoss or Spreading Spike Moss, is a type of ancient, non-vascular, and spore-producing plant belonging to the Selaginellaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Selaginella parkeri var. pedata include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal usage.
